questions.question: Which core/digital banking concept best matches: centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time?
questions.explanation: Core Banking System is defined as: centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time.

questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'Core Banking System'?
options: end-to-end sequence of customer interactions with bank
controls and monitoring to prevent money laundering
current and savings account product category
centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time
questions.explanation: Core Banking System refers to: centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time.

questions.question: 'Core Banking System' belongs mainly to which core banking area?
questions.explanation: Core Banking System is mainly part of Core Banking Fundamentals.

questions.question: Identify the correct core banking term-definition mapping.
options: KYC -> centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time
Core Banking System -> centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time
eKYC -> centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time
Reconciliation -> centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time
questions.explanation: Only 'Core Banking System -> centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time' is correctly mapped.

questions.question: A Bank SO IT requirement states: centralized platform processing banking transactions across branches in real time. Which concept should be selected?
questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to Core Banking System.
